claim_boundary: CAD-derived mold-process window proxy; not mold-flow, sampled resin data, or toolmaker signoff.

cases.target: <= 120 preferred, <= 160 caution for long thin PC+ABS shells
cases.note: Uses full device height over nominal wall as a conservative CAD proxy until mold-flow exists.

cases.target: Quote tool and press capacity above the high estimate with supplier resin pressure data.
cases.note: Uses 0.35-0.55 tons/cm2 as an early PC+ABS projected-area quote window.

cases.target: 0.50-0.80 wall ratio with toolmaker-confirmed gate land and vestige
cases.note: Small gates protect cosmetics but raise orange streak/blush and shear sensitivity.

cases.target: >= 2.0 diameters, with final baffles/conformal cooling from toolmaker
cases.note: Straight CAD channels are layout evidence only; cycle time and warp need tool simulation.

cases.target: boss wall <= 1.10x nominal and ribs <= 0.70x nominal
cases.note: Bosses and battery ribs need steel-safe coring and texture review to avoid read-through.

cases.target: 8 pins with marks hidden from exterior A-surfaces
cases.note: Modeled ejectors prove review intent, not pin balance or cosmetic approval.

process_window.material_family: PC+ABS or glass-filled PC/ABS, molded orange
process_window.drying: Dry PC+ABS per resin datasheet before molding; record dryer dew point and residence time.
process_window.pack_hold: Start with 95-99% fill transfer, stepped pack/hold DOE, and gate-freeze study.
process_window.venting: Add vents at end-of-fill around top corners, camera window, USB saddle, and snap-hook roots.
cosmetic_controls: Orange color plaque approval before tool texture freeze.
Gate vestige and blush review on first shots under production lighting.
Texture-depth/draft review before any hard-tool steel commitment.

toolmaker_questions: Run mold-flow fill/pack/warp with selected orange PC+ABS resin, dual submarine gates, and fan-gate alternate.
Return predicted pressure at V/P transfer, clamp tonnage, weld lines, air traps, shrink, and corner warp.
Confirm gate size, land length, vent locations, ejector layout, cooling layout, and steel-safe tuning stock.
Review whether the long thin shell needs additional gating or flow leaders before DVT tooling.
